## Definition of Done

- [ ] Tests added/updated for new/changed behavior
- [ ] TypeScript strict mode — no type errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Security: no hardcoded secrets, PAN/CVV not logged
- [ ] Documentation updated (if API surface changed)
- [ ] Observability: relevant logs/metrics added
- [ ] Reviewed by at least 1 team member
- [ ] CI checks pass

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you tested these changes. -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration/smoke test evidence (paste output or link)
- [ ] Manual verification in staging (if applicable)

## Security Checklist (for security-labeled PRs)

- [ ] Sensitive data is masked in all log output
- [ ] Webhook signatures are verified before processing
- [ ] No new environment variables contain secrets in plaintext
- [ ] Anti-replay protections are maintained
